selectedSlice: Add in-page filters to the scoped Presentation schedule.
selectionReason: The existing /api/presentation-slots route already returns scoped rows with status and outline status, but the workspace showed one undifferentiated list.
userFacingImprovement: Students, assigned mentors, program teachers, and admins can narrow visible presentation slots to ready-for-check-out, checked-out, checked-in, or outline-follow-up rows without a new route.
privacyAndPermissionNotes: No new API route, query parameter, mutation, role, tenant, site, program, mentor, or student visibility was added.
Filtering happens only over rows already returned by the existing scoped presentation route.
Existing check-out and check-in controls remain limited to program_teacher and admin rendering.

validation.notes: git diff --check reported only CRLF normalization warnings.

deferred: Hosted section-level permission proof still needs safe hosted fake-account proof and audit-event writes.
Review Queue missing-submission semantics remain deferred until backend queue rows exist.
Archive retry/regenerate controls remain deferred pending mutation policy.
nextRecommended: Add Presentation schedule URL/state persistence only if product wants shareable presentation-day filters; otherwise inspect hosted permission proof prerequisites.
doNotRepeat: Do not re-add Presentation schedule status filters unless data-presentation-filters or the focused workspace coverage regresses.
